headline: Costco Tariff Refunds Test Membership Model And Long Term Share Value
summary: Costco Wholesale plans to pass billions in tariff refunds directly to members through lower prices following a landmark federal court ruling. The U.S. Court of International Trade ordered refunds of tariffs invalidated by a Supreme Court decision, affecting major importers including Costco. Costco's CEO has said the company will return any refunded amounts to members instead of keeping the windfall. For investors watching NasdaqGS:COST, this move sits on top of a share price of $982.57 and...

headline: Okta To Rally Around 22%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Friday
summary: Top Wall Street analysts changed their outlook on these top names. For a complete view of all analyst rating changes, including upgrades and downgrades, visit our analyst ratings page. B of A Securities raised Marvell Technology Inc price target from $90 to $110. Keefe, Bruyette & Woods cut Hippo Holdings Inc price target from $34 to $33. Piper Sandler raised Karman Holdings Inc price target from $110 to $127. Morgan Stanley cut AES Corp price target from $23 to $15. Clear Street raised Erasca Inc price target from $11 to $20. Baird raised Union Pacific Corp price target from $239 to $311. BTIG increased Costco Wholesale Corp price target from $1,115 to $1,125. B. Riley Securities slashed Brilliant Earth Group Inc price target from $29 to $25.
